lines.raw: Lesson 81 | 第81课
Roast beef and potatoes | 烤牛肉和土豆

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.chinese: 卡罗尔为什么感到失望？
lines.raw: Why is Carol disappointed? | 卡罗尔为什么感到失望？
Hi, Carol! Where's Tom? | 嗨，卡罗尔！汤姆在哪儿？
He's upstairs. | 他在楼上。
He's having a bath. | 他正在洗澡。
Tom! | 汤姆！
Yes? | 怎么了？
Sam's here. | 山姆来了。
I'm nearly ready. | 我快好了。
Hello, Sam. | 你好，山姆。
Have a cigarette. | 来根烟吧。
No, thanks, Tom. | 不了，谢谢你，汤姆。

lines.english: Have a glass of whisky then.
lines.raw: Have a glass of whisky then. | 那来杯威士忌吧。
OK. | 好的。
Thanks. | 谢谢。

lines.chinese: 晚饭准备好了吗，卡罗尔？
lines.raw: Is dinner ready, Carol? | 晚饭准备好了吗，卡罗尔？
It's nearly ready. | 差不多好了。

lines.english: We can have dinner at seven o'clock.
lines.raw: We can have dinner at seven o'clock. | 我们七点可以吃晚饭。

lines.english: Sam and I had lunch together today.
lines.chinese: 山姆和我今天一起吃了午饭。
lines.raw: Sam and I had lunch together today. | 山姆和我今天一起吃了午饭。
We went to a restaurant. | 我们去了一家餐馆。
What did you have? | 你们吃了什么？

lines.english: We had roast beef and potatoes.
lines.chinese: 我们吃了烤牛肉和土豆。
lines.raw: We had roast beef and potatoes. | 我们吃了烤牛肉和土豆。
Oh! | 哦！
What's the matter, Carol? | 怎么了，卡罗尔？

lines.english: Well, you're going to have roast beef and potatoes again tonight!
lines.chinese: 呃，你们今晚又要吃烤牛肉和土豆了！
lines.raw: Well, you're going to have roast beef and potatoes again tonight! | 呃，你们今晚又要吃烤牛肉和土豆了！
